Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're heading to practice, right!?!?!?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be in the classroom, so holler at me!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's head to practice!!![n]{f 1 5 0}I'll show you what I'm made of today for sure!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Time for practice! Don't be skippin' on me now!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you heading to practice today? You are, right!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: IT'S MIYA[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: IT'S M[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}ARE YOU READY!?!?!? LET'S RACE TO PRACTICE!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm gonna give it 110% today!!![n]{f 1 5 0}Let's sprint to practice!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's head to practice!!! Today's the day I finally beat you!!![n]{f 1 5 0}Well. In my head!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}C'mon, let's go!!! You best pick up the pace!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What are you up to today? If you're free, let's go somewhere![n]{f 1 5 0}Let me know if you can make it before the afternoon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you free today?[n]{f 1 5 0}Let's go watch a movie! I heard this flick is really burning with passion, so it's bound to get us fired up![n]{f 1 5 0}I got some tickets from a friend, so let me know if you can make it by the afternoon![n]{f 1 1}
